items.title_zh: 伊朗称霍尔木兹海峡因船只遭到袭击而再次关闭

items.desc_zh: 德黑兰将其行动归咎于美国的封锁，称这违反了两国达成的停火协议。

items.title_en: All construction of Trump's White House ballroom can resume, appeals court says
items.title_zh: 上诉法院表示，特朗普白宫宴会厅的所有建设工作都可以恢复
items.desc_en: Construction is expected to continue at the White House until the next hearing which is due to take place in June.
items.desc_zh: 白宫的施工预计将继续进行，直到六月举行的下一次听证会为止。

items.title_en: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
items.title_zh: 墨西哥的谢因鲍姆否认在征服争端后与西班牙发生“外交危机”
items.desc_en: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.
items.desc_zh: 墨西哥总统表示，西班牙殖民统治从来不存在紧张关系，这已经成为一个棘手的问题。

items.title_en: Orbán's era was over in a flash and Hungary's next PM is a man in a hurry
items.title_zh: 欧尔班的时代一瞬间结束了，匈牙利下一任总理是个匆忙的人
items.desc_en: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.
items.desc_zh: 彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）和他的蒂萨政党在获得戏剧性的压倒性胜利后，正在​​抓紧时间为权力交接做准备。

items.title_en: HiPP recalls jarred baby food in Austria over contamination fears
items.title_zh: HiPP 因担心污染而在奥地利召回罐装婴儿食品
items.desc_en: Police are investigating whether jars sold in Spar shops were criminally interfered with.
items.desc_zh: 警方正在调查 Spar 商店出售的罐子是否受到刑事干扰。

items.title_en: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
items.title_zh: 教皇称“暴君”演讲并非针对特朗普
items.desc_en: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
items.desc_zh: 教皇表示，在与美国总统发生口角后，他的言论被误解了。

items.title_en: At least five killed in Kyiv as gunman opens fire and takes hostages
items.title_zh: 基辅枪手开枪劫持人质 至少五人死亡
items.desc_en: The country's interior minister says the attacker has been killed after a shoot-out with police.
items.desc_zh: 该国内政部长表示，袭击者在与警方交火后已被击毙。

items.title_en: French peacekeeper killed in southern Lebanon
items.title_zh: 法国维和人员在黎巴嫩南部丧生
items.desc_en: President Macron blames the attack on Hezbollah. The Iran-backed armed group denies "any connection" to the incident.
items.desc_zh: 马克龙总统将这次袭击归咎于真主党。伊朗支持的武装组织否认与该事件“有任何联系”。

items.title_en: There's an 'art' to writing AI prompts for personal finance, MIT professor says
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院教授表示，编写个人理财人工智能提示是一门“艺术”
items.desc_en: There's a good and bad way to write effective artificial intelligence prompts for personal finance advice.
items.desc_zh: 编写有效的人工智能提示以提供个人理财建议的方法有好有坏。

items.title_en: Trump signs order to speed review of psychedelics, including the controversial drug ibogaine
items.title_zh: 特朗普签署命令加快对迷幻药的审查，包括有争议的药物伊博加因
items.desc_en: Ibogaine is banned under the federal government's most restrictive category for illegal, high-risk drugs.
items.desc_zh: 伊博加因属于联邦政府最严格的非法、高风险药物类别，被禁止使用。

items.title_en: Iran war, $4 gas, took all the fun out of the U.S. consumer economy. There's only so much time to bring it back
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争、4美元汽油，让美国消费经济失去了所有乐趣。只有这么多时间把它带回来
items.desc_en: Consumers are still spending amid U.S.-Iran war and $4 gas prices, but there's a pullback at entertainment and dining venues hitting local economies hard.
items.desc_zh: 在美伊战争和油价 4 美元的背景下，消费者仍在消费，但娱乐和餐饮场所的减少对当地经济造成了沉重打击。

items.title_en: AI fears drive some young adults to grad school — 'people shelter in higher education,' expert says
items.title_zh: 专家表示，对人工智能的恐惧驱使一些年轻人去读研究生——“人们接受高等教育”
items.desc_en: Experts say going back to school for a graduate degree is one way to hedge against a rapidly changing labor market.
items.desc_zh: 专家表示，重返学校攻读研究生学位是应对快速变化的劳动力市场的一种方法。

items.title_en: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
items.title_zh: 数百万人聆听埃塞俄比亚明星抨击政府的歌曲
items.desc_en: The country's biggest musician Teddy Afro laments a lack of unity in the country on his new track.
items.desc_zh: 该国最著名的音乐家泰迪·阿弗罗 (Teddy Afro) 在他的新曲目中感叹该国缺乏团结。

items.title_en: Berkshire shares left behind as S&P 500 rallies to record high
items.title_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数上涨至历史新高，伯克希尔股价落后
items.desc_en: While the overall market was soaring over the past two weeks, Berkshire wasn't doing much of anything, as its shares slipped to MTD drops of just under 1%.
items.desc_zh: 虽然过去两周整体市场飙升，但伯克希尔并没有采取任何行动，其股价下跌至 MTD 跌幅略低于 1%。

items.title_en: Five stocks to buy ahead of earnings include one particular tech giant, Bank of America says
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，在财报公布前值得购买的五只股票包括一家特定的科技巨头
items.desc_en: Bank of America says it's bullish on stocks including Apple in advance of the release of their latest financials.
items.desc_zh: 美国银行表示，在发布最新财务数据之前，看好包括苹果在内的股票。

items.title_en: These chipmakers and other stocks are overbought after the market rally this week
items.title_zh: 这些芯片制造商和其他股票在本周市场反弹后已超买
items.desc_en: Investors should be on the lookout for pullbacks in rallying chipmakers and other stocks after the market's advance.
items.desc_zh: 投资者应留意市场上涨后芯片制造商和其他股票的回调。

items.title_en: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
items.title_zh: 英伟达与游戏玩家一度紧密的关系因人工智能而破裂，“这让我心碎”
items.desc_en: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.
items.desc_zh: 游戏玩家曾经帮助英伟达免于破产。现在，由于内存紧缺促使人们将注意力集中在 AI 芯片上，而 DLSS 5 扰乱了游戏设计，他们感觉自己被落在了后面。

items.title_en: 'It's just scale': Local mom-and-pop car dealerships are growing or dying amid industry consolidation, rise of mega-retailers
items.title_zh: “这只是规模”：随着行业整合和大型零售商的崛起，当地夫妻汽车经销商正在成长或消亡
items.desc_en: Multibillion-dollar dealerships have been on the rise amid a decadeslong consolidation that has led to a grow-or-die mentality for many U.S. auto retailers.
items.desc_zh: 经过数十年的整合，价值数十亿美元的经销商不断增加，这导致许多美国汽车零售商抱有“要么成长，要么灭亡”的心态。

items.title_en: Tornadoes Reported Across the Midwest as Powerful Storms Slam the Region - The New York Times
items.title_zh: 据报道，中西部地区遭遇龙卷风袭击，强风暴袭击该地区 - 纽约时报中文网
items.desc_en: Tornadoes Reported Across the Midwest as Powerful Storms Slam the Region  The New York TimesPowerful winds and reported tornadoes rip through the Midwest, leaving heavy damage but no deaths  NBC NewsS
items.desc_zh: 据报道，龙卷风横扫中西部，强大的风暴袭击了该地区《纽约时报》据报道，强风和龙卷风席卷了中西部，造成严重破坏，但无人死亡 NBC NewsS

items.title_en: French film star Nathalie Baye dies aged 77, media report
items.title_zh: 媒体报道法国影星娜塔莉·贝伊去世，享年 77 岁
items.desc_en: President Macron said France had "loved, dreamed and grown up" with the stalwart of French cinema.
items.desc_zh: 马克龙总统表示，法国与法国电影的坚定力量一起“热爱、梦想并成长”。

items.title_en: One dead after car hits pedestrians in Melbourne, police say
items.title_zh: 警方称墨尔本汽车撞倒行人造成一人死亡
items.desc_en: A man is arrested following a collision in which police say a car mounted a kerb and struck pedestrians.
items.desc_zh: 警方称，一辆汽车撞上了路边并撞上了行人，一名男子在一场碰撞事故中被捕。

items.title_en: Nexstar says it will appeal following U.S. judge ruling halting Tegna merger
items.title_zh: Nexstar 表示将在美国法官裁定停止 Tegna 合并后提起上诉
items.desc_en: Nexstar will appeal a judge's ruling halting its acquisition of rival broadcaster Tegna, as ​antitrust challenges from DirecTV ​and a group of states proceed.
items.desc_zh: 随着来自 DirecTV 和一些州的反垄断挑战的继续，Nexstar 将就法官停止收购竞争对手广播公司 Tegna 的裁决提出上诉。

items.title_en: U.S. renews Russian oil waiver after pressure from countries dealing with Iran war price shocks
items.title_zh: 在应对伊朗战争价格冲击的国家施压下，美国延长了俄罗斯石油豁免
items.desc_en: Lawmakers accused the government of going easy on Moscow as its war on Ukraine grinds on.
items.desc_zh: 立法者指责政府在乌克兰战争持续进行之际对莫斯科采取宽松态度。

items.title_en: DR Congo accepts first set of deportees from the US
items.title_zh: 刚果民主共和国接收第一批来自美国的被驱逐者
items.desc_en: The Congolese government stresses those expelled from the US are only in the country temporarily.
items.desc_zh: 刚果政府强调，那些被美国驱逐的人只是暂时留在该国。

items.title_en: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
items.title_zh: 我们与 30 多位央行行长、政策制定者和政治家进行了交谈。这是他们最关心的问题
items.desc_en: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.
items.desc_zh: 从滞胀到能源安全，政策制定者在接受 CNBC 采访时谈到了正在进行的美伊战争带来的最大风险。

items.title_en: Trump says U.S. has 'good news' on Iran, talks to continue over weekend
items.title_zh: 特朗普称美国有关于伊朗的“好消息” 周末会谈将继续
items.desc_en: President Trump tells reporters that the U.S. and Iran will jointly recover nuclear material after a deal is reached.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统告诉记者，美国和伊朗将在达成协议后共同回收核材料。

items.title_en: Madonna joins Sabrina Carpenter to surprise Coachella
items.title_zh: 麦当娜携手萨布丽娜·卡彭特为科切拉音乐节带来惊喜
items.desc_en: The Queen of Pop makes a guest appearance during the Espresso singer's headline set.
items.desc_zh: 流行天后在浓缩咖啡歌手的头条节目中客串亮相。

items.title_en: United CEO Scott Kirby and American CEO Robert Isom were once colleagues known as the 'dream team.' Now Kirby wants to acquire his rival - Fortune
items.title_zh: 联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比（Scott Kirby）和美国航空首席执行官罗伯特·伊索姆（Robert Isom）曾是被称为“梦之队”的同事。现在卡比想要收购他的竞争对手 - 财富
items.desc_en: United CEO Scott Kirby and American CEO Robert Isom were once colleagues known as the 'dream team.' Now Kirby wants to acquire his rival  FortuneAmerican Airlines Rejects United CEO’s Merger Proposal
items.desc_zh: 联合航空首席执行官斯科特·柯比（Scott Kirby）和美国航空首席执行官罗伯特·伊索姆（Robert Isom）曾是被称为“梦之队”的同事。现在柯比想收购他的竞争对手财富美国航空拒绝美联航首席执行官的合并提议

items.title_en: White House and Anthropic set aside court fight to meet amid fears over Mythos model
items.title_zh: 由于对神话模型的担忧，白宫和 Anthropic 搁置了法庭诉讼以进行会面
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump previously railed against the company for rejecting broad government demands.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统此前曾批评该公司拒绝广泛的政府要求。

items.title_en: Three sentenced for 'man in bear suit' insurance scam

items.desc_zh: Meta 和 YouTube 等公司的高管将被问到他们正在采取哪些措施来保护儿童。

items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告

items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站
items.desc_en: The tech giant said it will punish sites that block back button navigation from June.
items.desc_zh: 这家科技巨头表示，将从 6 月份开始惩罚屏蔽后退按钮导航的网站。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。
